transcript: Well, who... who's on the... who else is on the line?
Okay, so did you call here?
No, it don't. Well, I'll hang up and let the other party call me back.
Well, I don't have him on. Hello?
Well, who... who's on the line now, here?
Well, I'm Gwen at the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Waffle_House Waffle House].
I don't even know who I'm talkin' to.
Well, I'm Gwen. Somebody called the Waffle House.
Well, wait a minute. Let me put it this way. Which one of you all called the Waffle House?
Since everybody seems to be lost, let's just hang up and see where we end...
Oh, um... but, see, I think... I think you guys are on the right...
...the right track there. Hello, Wall Units? Hello.
